workspacesweb.usersettings.CfnAbout: This resource specifies user settings that can be associated with a web portal. Once associated with a web portal, user settings control how users can transfer data between a streaming session and the their local devices.

workspacesweb.usersettings.CookieSynchro.Description: The configuration that specifies which cookies should be synchronized from the end user's local browser to the remote browser.

workspacesweb.usersettings.CopyAllowed.Description: Specifies whether the user can copy text from the streaming session to the local device.

workspacesweb.usersettings.DisconnectTim.Description: The amount of time that a streaming session remains active after users disconnect.

workspacesweb.usersettings.DownloadAllow.Description: Specifies whether the user can download files from the streaming session to the local device.

workspacesweb.usersettings.IdleDisconnec.Description: The amount of time that users can be idle (inactive) before they are disconnected from their streaming session and the disconnect timeout interval begins.

workspacesweb.usersettings.PasteAllowed.Description: Specifies whether the user can paste text from the local device to the streaming session.

workspacesweb.usersettings.PrintAllowed.Description: Specifies whether the user can print to the local device.

workspacesweb.usersettings.Tags.Description: The tags to add to the user settings resource. A tag is a key-value pair.

workspacesweb.usersettings.UploadAllowed.Description: Specifies whether the user can upload files from the local device to the streaming session.
